finding: Path: single dilated feeding artery + single draining vein

differentials.name: asymptomatic with abdominal bruit / abdominal pain
differentials.raw: asymptomatic with abdominal bruit / abdominal pain

context: √  tortuous varices over time √  enlargement of renal vein US: √   focal area of aliasing / color saturation ← high flow rate + vessel tortuosity √   ⇑ flow velocity + ⇓ resistance in feeding artery √  arterial pulsations in draining vein Angio: √  detailed vascular anatomy for planning embolic occlusion √  diminished nephrogram ± cortical atrophy distal to fistula ← reduced flow to renal segment Cx: Prognosis:  spontaneous closure within a few months
